nodes.name: Replay Entry
nodes.notes: Contract B replay entry. Replays the original trigger with the same correlation_id.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { key: p.idem_key, tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null, workflow: '13-compliance-reporting' } }];

const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'compliance', step: 'build-export', status: 'skipped', payload: { reason: 'duplicate run', key: p.idem_key } } }];

const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'compliance', step: 'build-export', status: 'started', payload: { source: p.replay ? 'replay' : 'scheduled-or-webhook', execution_id: p.execution_id, tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null } } }];
